key_insight: Chat-ISV integrates a knowledge graph for improved decision support in managing VOCs in the steel industry.
engineering_relevance: This approach enhances the reliability of LLMs for specialized industrial applications, reducing the risk of misinformation.
method: Developed a knowledge graph with 27,180 nodes and 81,779 semantic edges.
Implemented multi-agent Q&A system with advanced retrieval techniques.
Utilized topology optimization to minimize isolated nodes from 57% to 4.08%.
evidence_signal: Chat-ISV scored 96.93% precision and 72.63% recall in expert evaluations.
watch_item: The dependence on curated literature may limit applicability to emerging VOCs not in the dataset.
paper_title: Traceable Knowledge Graph Reasoning Enables LLM-Assisted Decision Support for Industrial VOCs in the Steel Industry
